description_long: This is a vintage-style convertible car with a long, low-slung body and a classic, elegant design. The exterior is predominantly white with chrome accents on the bumpers, grille, and side mirrors, giving it a luxurious and timeless appearance. The front features a prominent vertical grille flanked by round headlights set in chrome housings, while the rear showcases simple rectangular taillights and a tan leather-look interior. The car has two doors, a spacious open cabin, and a tan dashboard with a large steering wheel and visible instrument dials. The wheels are stylized with whitewall tires and chrome hubcaps, enhancing its retro aesthetic. This vehicle is designed for urban streets, exuding sophistication and style reminiscent of classic luxury convertibles.
description: A vintage white convertible car with chrome accents, tan interior, and classic styling, featuring a long body and open cabin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical chrome grille, round headlights, and wide bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, open cabin, and detailed wheel design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tan dashboard, steering wheel, and rectangular taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door, open seating, and chrome details.
